title: WebUIQueueState
description: Schema for the WebUI-visible queue state projection. Captures the lifecycle of each worker queue entry from dispatch to completion. See docs/ai-native/webui-queue-state-schema.md for field-level documentation.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Current is 1. Increment when the shape changes.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this projection was last written.

entries.description: Queue entries in any state. Empty array when no tasks are tracked.

summary.description: Aggregate counts by state. Optional convenience field for WebUI dashboards.

issueNumber.description: GitHub issue number for this queue entry.

state.description: Lifecycle state. queued = waiting for dispatch, launching = launcher preparing the worker, running = worker is executing, pr-created = PR opened awaiting review/merge, blocked = waiting on a dependency or external action, done = merged or terminal.

conflictGroup.description: Conflict group identifier from the task contract.

branch.description: Git branch or worktree the worker is operating on.

prNumber.description: GitHub PR number, if a PR has been opened. Null otherwise.

blockedBy.description: Issue or PR numbers blocking progress. Relevant when state is 'blocked'.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last state transition for this entry.

actorRole.description: Worker role from the task contract.

pmPhase.description: Wave/phase identifier for grouping in the UI.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the current state (e.g. 'waiting for #420 to merge').
